criteriaResults.evidence: Integration test: child's captured chat params show tools=['tool_a'] only + fresh messages=[{user 'do X'}] (no parent turns); parent's next ToolResultMessage carries child summary, isError:false.

def.model->clientFactory+resolveModel override, def.effort forwarded/omitted, maxTurns default-10/override, budget REFERENCE equality; shared Budget(maxUsd 1.0) charged 0.3 parent + 0.8 child = usdSpent 1.1, parent's next turn capped by same ceiling.

Unknown name -> isError listing valid names without calling runLoop; refusal/budget_exceeded/error/aborted -> isError naming reason; throwing runLoop -> isError never throws; parent continues in integration tests.

No subagents -> tools REFERENCE equality (same array), no spawn_subagent; empty [] equally byte-identical; config parse never sets tools; createDefaultConfig never adds it; bridge has no import-time side effects.

8 bridge tests: 'mcp__echo' prefix, Object.hasOwn(tool,'readOnly')===false, round-trip via ORIGINAL upstream name, close() exactly once on success AND throw (finally), multi-part text join, isError mapping, thrown callTool never escapes.

filesChanged.description: SubagentDef + buildSubagentTool(defs, parentParams, opts{runLoop}): scoped fresh child params (SAME Budget, subagents:undefined one-level cap; session/compaction/onEvent/hooks/onTextDelta/initialMessages excluded; parallelReadOnlyTools/abortSignal/maxTokens inherited), never-throwing result mapping.

McpBridgeClientLike injectable interface; SdkMcpBridgeClient wrapping @modelcontextprotocol/sdk Client+StdioClientTransport (existing dep, mirrors src/mcp/external-client.ts); createMcpToolBridge (mcp__ prefix, non-readOnly); runWithMcpBridge (close in finally).
subagents?: SubagentDef[]; local tools/handlers augmentation via buildSubagentTool with runLoop:runAgenticLoop (breaks cycle via type-only import in subagents.ts); SAME references when absent/empty.
McpBridgeServerSchema + ToolsSectionSchema {mcpBridge {enabled default false, server}}; tools optional on BoberConfigSchema; NOT in createDefaultConfig.
12 unit tests incl. field-by-field child-param table.
8 tests with injected stub, no process spawn.

commits: 288fc4f - bober(sprint-10): in-process scoped subagents (spawn_subagent) + opt-in MCP tool bridge
notes: All 5 briefing design decisions followed: SDK-based bridge (reuses existing @modelcontextprotocol/sdk dep, mirrors external-client.ts), McpBridgeClientLike injectable idiom, type-only import + runLoop DI breaks the cycle, loop stays hermetic (runWithMcpBridge is the consumer-side composition helper, never wired into runAgenticLoop), child-param inherit/exclude table implemented + unit-tested. Deliberately NOT wired: no role section exposes subagents/bridge; no automated call site invokes createMcpToolBridge (a future consumer reads config.tools.mcpBridge.enabled). Suite 3870->3903 (+33). Full suite green with extended timeouts.
